Final Turn: Add logic to log the extracted details to `/workspace/network_debug.log` (in append mode) so each packet's IP, time, and domain are persisted.
Note: `/workspace/` isn't an allowed directory, so I'll log to `/tmp/mcp-workspace/network_debug.log` instead. I'll add logging configuration and integrate it into `process_packet`.

+# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
+# Logging configuration

+# Persist every observed DNS query to a log file in append mode so that
+# entries from prior runs are preserved across restarts.
+LOG_FILE = "/tmp/mcp-workspace/network_debug.log"
+
+logger = logging.getLogger("dns_monitor")
+logger.setLevel(logging.INFO)
+
+# Avoid adding duplicate handlers if the module is imported multiple times.
+if not logger.handlers:
+    file_handler = logging.FileHandler(LOG_FILE, mode="a", encoding="utf-8")
+    file_handler.setLevel(logging.INFO)
+    file_handler.setFormatter(
+        logging.Formatter("%(asctime)s - %(message)s",
+                          datefmt="%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
+    )
+    logger.addHandler(file_handler)
